ab: Hmuya su nchaya musa beywi ka isu?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Mriq ku rulu musa beywi ka yaku.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Nchuya musa byoing ka hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Mksa musa byoing ka hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Nchuya su musa Pnghu ka isu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Tapa ku skoki musa Pnghu ka yaku.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Nchuya su musa Pnghu ka isu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Pnapa ku asu ka musa Pnghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Tapa su manu musa sapah ka isu?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Tapa ku cyeyyun musa sapah ka yaku.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Tapa manu musa sapah pyasan ka Tapas?
en: How does Tapas go to school?

ab: Tapa kisya musa sapah pyasan ka Tapas.
en: Tapas goes to school by train.

ab: Tapa manu musa pnrhulan ka Sudu?
en: How does Basaw go to church?

ab: Mriq ddeyngsya musa pnrhulan ka Sudu.
en: Sudu goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Tapa su cyeyyun musa sapah pyasan ka isu hu?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Uxay, tapa ku basu musa sapah pyasan ka yaku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Mriq su ddeyngsya musa sapah pyasan ka isu hu?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Iyaq, mriq ku ddeyngsya musa sapah pyasan ka yaku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Tapa su kawtyey musa Takaw ka isu hu?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Iyaq, tapa ku kawtyey musa Takaw ka yaku.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Ya su tapa kisya mi tapa skosi musa Tayto ka isu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Tapa ku skoki, tapa skoki mi kisya u nuqu ini biyaw ka tapa skoki.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Musa su pnrhulan pa tapa su basu ya mriq rulu?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Mriq ku rulu musa pnrhulan ka yaku, mriq rulu mi tapa basu pa nuqu mslxan ka mriq rulu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Bbriyan cawsu u msdalih sapah namu hu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Ini sdalih, to ku bay mriq otobay musa briyan cawsu ka yaku.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Msdalih sapah pyasan ka sapah yobing hu?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Msdalih balay, mksa da u kiya ka mpdhuq da.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Msdalih ppanan rulu ka equn pnchdanan hu?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Miyah nganguc ppanan rulu da u mksa rima pungkang dungan, kiya ka dhuq da.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
